rationale: In the citing paper, Dasgupta, Siddarth, and Silva-Risso (2007) appears only in a grouped parenthetical citation in the data section as one of several studies that used PIN data. The citation functions as a generic example of prior work using the same data source, not as a basis for the paper's theory, hypotheses, model structure, or interpretation of results. There is no distinct discussion of that specific paper's findings or framework in the main argument.
